find all instances where we are using the nodejs process APIs and migrate them to use Deno.command or equivalent Deno APIs.
Standardize on Deno.Command over Node APIs: In src/shared/chat-session.js, the code imports exec and spawnSync from the Node polyfill child_process to handle ! and !! bash commands.

In src/shared/workflow/workflow.js, the extractTasks function uses a strict regex (/\|\s*(\d+)\s*\|\s*(\w[\w-]*)\s*\|.../) to parse the ### Tasks table. While you recently added the structured tasks array to the plan_written tool schema (which is the ideal approach), falling back to this regex is risky. LLMs frequently hallucinate minor Markdown table formatting (e.g., dropping a pipe, adding extra whitespace). Consider using a relaxed Markdown parser for this fallback, or strictly enforcing the plan_written tool validation to ensure the JSON array is always present.
